# Spinning Up in OpenScope — core analysis environment (pip)
# Pure-Python / manylinux wheels: no CUDA, runs anywhere incl. the GB10 NGC container.
# Pin loosely; re-check at install time (see docs/03 caveats).

# --- DANDI / NWB access ---
dandi>=0.76
pynwb>=3.1
hdmf>=3.14
h5py>=3.11
remfile>=0.1.13      # stream NWB over S3 without downloading
fsspec>=2024.6
aiohttp>=3.9
# lindi               # optional: faster remote NWB loads

# --- electrophysiology analysis ---
# nwbwidgets>=0.11  # DISABLED: 0.11.3 pulls deprecated ndx-icephys-meta, which breaks on
#                   # hdmf>=4 (removed call_docval_func). Use Neurosift to browse NWB visually,
#                   # or pin hdmf<4 if you specifically need the in-Jupyter widgets.
numpy>=1.26
scipy>=1.13
pandas>=2.2
matplotlib>=3.8
# spikeinterface[full,widgets]   # only if you re-sort; 000253 ships sorted units
fooof>=1.1          # aperiodic-vs-oscillatory spectral separation (epych / eLife use "FOOOF").
                    # NB: fooof is deprecated in favour of `specparam` (same algorithm, new name).

# --- the EEG-side bridge (apply the same contrasts to human data later) ---
mne>=1.12
# pyhgf>=0.3          # JAX HGF for trial-by-trial prediction-error regressors
# mtrf                # temporal response functions

# --- notebook ---
jupyterlab>=4.2
